name.ja: <ruby>混<rt>こん</rt></ruby><ruby>沌<rt>とん</rt></ruby>のマジック・ボックス

text.en: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets another card(s) you control: Return 1 of those cards you control to the hand (if face-down, reveal it), and if you do, destroy 1 card on the field, then you can Special Summon 1 monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your hand, with a different name than the returned card, ignoring its Summoning conditions. If this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 Ritual Monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your hand or Deck.
text.zh-CN: ①：对手发动以自己场上的其他卡为对象的效果时可以发动。将该自己的卡中的1张放回手牌（里侧表示卡则翻开确认），将场上的1张卡破坏。然后，可从手牌将1只卡名与所放回手牌的卡不同的、记载有“光与暗的仪式”卡名的怪兽无视召唤条件特殊召唤。②：此卡被对手破坏的情况下可以发动。从手牌・牌组将1只记载有“光与暗的仪式”卡名的仪式怪兽特殊召唤。
